chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-5065 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For haring of main case. 03.09.2025 ------------- This is an old petition of 2023. On the last two dates of hearings i.e. 26.02.2024 and 18.03.2024, which is over 11⁄2 years ago when learned counsel for the petitioner was called absent. Today, despite the lapse of 11⁄2 years, once again learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation. In the last 1 1⁄2 years petitioner has failed to diligently pursue this petition. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
